title: CDAC Thiruvananthapuram – Project Engineer, Project Associate and More – 60 Posts

basic_details.job_title: CDAC Thiruvananthapuram Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 60 Project Engineer, Project Associate and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Centre for Development of Advanced Computing (CDAC Thiruvananthapuram) Recruitment 2026 for posts of 60 Project Engineer, Project Associate and More Posts. Candidates with B.Tech/B.E, M.Sc, MCA Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 13-05-2026, and closes on 26-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through CDAC Thiruvananthapuram website, cdac.in.
basic_details.organization_name: Centre for Development of Advanced Computing (C-DAC), Thiruvananthapuram (A Scientific Society under MeitY, Govt. of India)
basic_details.post_name: Project Manager (PM), Senior Project Engineer (SPE), Project Engineer - Experienced (PE-Exp), Project Engineer - Fresher (PE-Fresher), Project Associate - Fresher (PA-Fresher)

salary_details.pay_scale: 5 years relaxation (in addition to other applicable relaxations)

how_to_apply: Candidates must register their candidature by filling the Google Form available on the official CDAC website below the respective post details, on or before 26-05-2026 by 17:00 hrs. Only registered candidates will be allowed to attend the walk-in/online interview. After registering, candidates must download and fill the prescribed CDAC Application Form and One Page Write-Up (available on the website below the post details) and attach a latest passport size photograph. Hard copies of applications/documents are NOT to be sent to C-DAC; all communications will be via email only. The interview call letter and all correspondence will be sent to the email ID provided in the online application — no hard copy will be sent. All recruitment-related queries should be addressed to [email protected], clearly mentioning the post code and candidate name in the subject line.
seo_tags: Centre for Development of Advanced Computing Project Engineer
